skills.name: Respira Setup Assistant

details.hero_subtitle: Diagnose your MCP connection, walk through first-time setup, and fix common problems. Works even when Respira is broken — it is the skill you run first.

capabilities.desc: 9 checks in one pass — Node.js version, MCP config, connectivity, plugin version, API negotiation, and npm update availability.

capabilities.title: Version Compatibility
capabilities.desc: Detects version mismatches between MCP server and plugin. Tells you exactly what to update and why.

capabilities.title: Guided Setup
capabilities.desc: Walks through first-time connection step by step — plugin install, API key creation, MCP configuration.

capabilities.title: Troubleshooting
capabilities.desc: Resolves timeouts, 401s, 403s, staging auth issues, and REST API blocks with plain-language instructions.

skills.name: Content Portability
skills.description: Export WordPress pages, posts, and custom posts to portable local packages with builder data and media, then import to another site with smart ID remapping and auto-backup safety.
skills.author: Respira for WordPress

details.hero_subtitle: Back up your WordPress content to portable local packages. Migrate to another site with smart ID remapping. Auto-backup before AI edits.

capabilities.title: Portable Content Export
capabilities.desc: Export pages, posts, and custom post types with full builder data, meta, and hashes to a structured local package.

capabilities.title: Smart Import & Migration
capabilities.desc: Import content to another site with automatic ID remapping for media, posts, and builder JSON references.

capabilities.title: Auto-Backup Before Edits

capabilities.title: Diff Against Live Site
capabilities.desc: Compare local exports against current site state to see exactly what changed since your last backup.

expected_findings: Machine-Readable JSON — Full content, builder payload, allowlisted meta, and computed hashes for every page and post.
Human-Readable Markdown — Browse your backup in any text editor or GitHub — heading structure, text, and image references.
Optional Media Download — Download referenced images locally for fully portable offline packages.
Builder Data Preservation — Elementor, Bricks, Divi builder JSON exported alongside standard WordPress content.
Hash Verification — Content, builder, and meta hashes for every item — verify import fidelity automatically.
Package Manifest — Complete metadata: source site, WordPress version, content counts, warnings, and skipped items.

skills.name: Activity Report Composer
skills.description: Turn the audit log of work done on a WordPress site into a polished written report. Wraps the v7.1 respira_generate_activity_report MCP tool with six framings: agency client report, case study, internal recap, testimonial draft, build-in-public, personal recap.
skills.author: Respira for WordPress

details.hero_subtitle: End-of-month client reports, case studies, build-in-public posts, testimonials — all written from the same audit log of work that actually shipped. No invented numbers, no marketing varnish.

capabilities.title: Six framings
capabilities.desc: Agency client report, case study (with anonymize toggle), internal recap, testimonial draft, build-in-public, personal recap. One audit log, six narratives.

capabilities.title: Real hours saved + cost saved
capabilities.desc: Numbers come from respira_generate_activity_report — totals.edits, totals.snapshots, hoursSaved, costSaved at the operator's stated rate. Never invented.

capabilities.title: Three output formats
capabilities.desc: Markdown for Notion/docs, email-ready HTML for direct sending, social-shaped for LinkedIn / X.

capabilities.title: Anonymize for case studies
capabilities.desc: Replaces client name with industry descriptor, redacts URLs and named team members, keeps the numbers exact.

details.v1_0_0_changes: Initial release in v7.1 Roots. Wraps the new respira_generate_activity_report MCP tool — the headline tool of Roots — with six prompting framings and three output formats.

skills.name: Brand Voice Synthesizer
skills.description: Read 5-10 published posts and extract the brand voice — tone, lexicon, sentence patterns, person used, formality, signature phrases, phrases the site never uses. Persist it so every future content-writing skill produces copy that sounds like the brand, not like generic AI.
skills.author: Respira for WordPress

details.hero_subtitle: Every blog post Claude writes, in your voice — not generic AI voice. The verbal counterpart to the Design System Synthesizer.

capabilities.title: Voice signal extraction
capabilities.desc: Person used (I / we / you), formality, sentence length (avg / median / p90), paragraph length, reading grade, tone descriptors.

capabilities.title: Lexicon mapping
capabilities.desc: Preferred words the site reaches for, signature multi-word phrases used repeatedly, and the AVOIDED lexicon — words conspicuously absent that competitor sites would use.

capabilities.title: Punctuation + structural patterns
capabilities.desc: Em dash usage, exclamation marks, oxford comma, opens-with-question habits, ends-with-CTA habits, bullet list and code block usage patterns.

capabilities.title: Real-corpus examples
capabilities.desc: A 'this is your voice' paragraph quoted verbatim from your own corpus, plus a constructed counter-example showing what your voice is NOT.

details.v1_0_0_changes: Initial release in v7.1 Roots. Part of the brand-foundation trio: Design System Synthesizer, Brand Voice Synthesizer, Page Template Library Bootstrapper.

skills.name: Conversion Audit
skills.description: Audit a WordPress site for conversion-rate friction across six dimensions: above-the-fold clarity, CTA hierarchy, form length, social proof placement, page speed, and trust signals. Prioritized fixes with expected impact — recommendations, not redesigns.
skills.author: Respira for WordPress

details.hero_subtitle: A CRO check, not a redesign. Prioritized fixes — each with what to change, why, and expected impact.

capabilities.title: Six-dimension scoring
capabilities.desc: Above-the-fold clarity, CTA hierarchy, form length, social proof placement, page speed (from SpeedScan), trust signals. Each scored 0–3 per page.

capabilities.title: Prioritized fix list
capabilities.desc: Top 5–8 fixes ranked by expected impact. Each one names the current state, the change to make, and why.

capabilities.title: What's working callouts
capabilities.desc: Tells you what NOT to change. Strong patterns get highlighted so the rebuild doesn't drop the parts already converting.

capabilities.title: Native form parsing
capabilities.desc: For Gravity Forms, WPForms, Contact Form 7 — parses the form definition (not the rendered HTML) so the field count is accurate.

skills.name: Custom Post Type Architect
skills.description: Design and create WordPress custom post types end to end — CPT + supporting taxonomies + ACF field group + sample entries + builder-specific single template suggestion. Uses new v7.1 MCP tools: respira_create_post_type, respira_create_taxonomy, respira_create_acf_field_group.
skills.author: Respira for WordPress

details.hero_subtitle: Give the agent a brief — 'a portfolio with case studies' — and it designs the post type, picks the right taxonomies, defines the ACF field group, creates two sample entries, and suggests a single template for your active page builder.

capabilities.title: End-to-end CPT scaffolding
capabilities.desc: CPT shape (labels, supports, public/private, has_archive, REST exposure) + taxonomies + ACF field group + sample entries, all in one workflow.

capabilities.title: Sensible defaults per content type
capabilities.desc: Knows the right field set for case studies, team members, events, podcast episodes, properties, recipes, FAQs, testimonials, courses, lessons. You override at the review step.

capabilities.title: Builder-aware template suggestions
capabilities.desc: After creating the CPT, suggests where to build the single template — Bricks Templates, Elementor Theme Builder, Divi Theme Builder, Gutenberg/FSE, Oxygen, Breakdance.

capabilities.title: Review-before-create gate
capabilities.desc: Outputs the proposed CPT shape, taxonomies, and ACF fields for your review before any create call. CPTs are forever — get it right the first time.

details.v1_0_0_changes: Initial release in v7.1 Roots. Wraps the new respira_create_post_type, respira_create_taxonomy, and respira_create_acf_field_group MCP tools — content-architecture tools that didn't exist before v7.1.

skills.name: Design System Synthesizer
skills.description: Read your site's representative pages, theme files, and media library to extract a complete reusable design system — logo, colors, typography, spacing scale, component patterns. Persist it as machine data AND generate a visible style-guide page on your site that renders the tokens visually.
skills.author: Respira for WordPress

details.hero_subtitle: Every page you build, automatically on brand. Tell Respira your design system, and every new page Claude generates matches your logo, colors, fonts, and component patterns.

capabilities.title: Brand identity capture
capabilities.desc: Logo, dark logo, favicon, social card, wordmark — extracted from the media library and site identity settings.

capabilities.title: Color palette synthesis
capabilities.desc: Primary, secondary, accent, 9-step neutral scale, and semantic colors (link / success / warning / error) — extracted from CSS variables, theme.json, and per-page observation.

capabilities.title: Typography + spacing scales
capabilities.desc: Heading family + weights + sizes (H1–H6), body family + weight + line-height, mono family, spacing scale, section padding norms, container max width.

capabilities.title: Component patterns
capabilities.desc: Button styles, card styles, hero patterns, section patterns — captured as named patterns future skills can reference.

capabilities.title: Visible style-guide page (new in v1.1)
capabilities.desc: Renders the synthesized design system as a real page on your site (private by default) — color swatches with hex codes, typography samples in actual styles, spacing scale blocks, component previews. Built with your active page builder, editable like any other page.

capabilities.title: Persistent — pairs with every content skill
capabilities.desc: Saved at the site level. Every Respira content-creation skill from that point on references the system, so new pages snap to your brand instead of guessing.

details.v1_0_0_changes: Initial release in v7.1 Roots. Flagship skill of the v7.1 brand-foundation suite (Design System + Brand Voice + Page Template Library). Together they form the explicit foundation that every future content-generation skill stands on.
details.v1_1_0_changes: v1.1.0 adds the visible style-guide page output. The synthesizer now builds a real WordPress page on the site (private draft by default) that renders the synthesized tokens visually: color swatches with hex codes, typography samples in actual styles, spacing scale blocks, component previews. Built with the active page builder so it's editable in the user's normal workflow. Solves the 'where do I see the design system' question.

skills.name: HTML to Bricks Builder
skills.description: Convert raw HTML/CSS into native Bricks Builder elements. Maps colors, typography, and spacing to your design system tokens so the result is drift-resistant. ACSS class mapping when ACSS is installed.
skills.author: Respira for WordPress

details.hero_subtitle: Designer hands you HTML from a Webflow or Figma export? Convert it into native Bricks elements — design system bound, ACSS aware, never inline HTML.

capabilities.title: Bricks-native conversion
capabilities.desc: Output is a tree of native Bricks elements (section, block, container, heading, text-basic, button, image) — never inline HTML.

capabilities.title: Design system mapping
capabilities.desc: Raw CSS hex values map to your design system color tokens. Raw font sizes map to your typography scale. The converted page stays in sync when the design system updates.

capabilities.title: ACSS class mapping
capabilities.desc: If ACSS is installed, common CSS patterns map to ACSS utility classes instead of inline settings.

capabilities.title: Three input modes
capabilities.desc: Paste HTML, give a URL (external images flagged not silently mirrored), or reference a file.

details.v1_0_0_changes: Initial release in v7.1 Roots. Resolves the most-upvoted open feature request on the Respira board.

skills.name: Page Template Library Bootstrapper
skills.description: Capture canonical page patterns (case study, service page, landing page hero + 3-up + CTA) as re-usable playbooks. Uses new v7.1 MCP tools respira_create_playbook + respira_list_playbooks + respira_update_playbook. Future page-generation skills spawn new pages from playbooks in seconds.
skills.author: Respira for WordPress

details.hero_subtitle: Build the case study layout once. Spawn 50 case studies from it, on-brand, in seconds.

capabilities.title: Two capture modes
capabilities.desc: From an existing page ('save this as a template') or from a pattern across multiple pages ('all our case studies follow this pattern — capture it').

capabilities.title: Section spine + slots
capabilities.desc: Identifies which parts of the page are structural (kept) vs which are variable content (turned into slots the user fills when spawning a new page from the playbook).

capabilities.title: Design system bound
capabilities.desc: Playbooks reference design system tokens (primary color, heading typography) by name — not by hex value — so they stay drift-resistant when the design system updates.

capabilities.title: Builder-locked
capabilities.desc: Each playbook is locked to the builder it was captured from. A Bricks playbook won't accidentally be applied to an Elementor page and produce a broken result.

details.v1_0_0_changes: Initial release in v7.1 Roots. Uses the new respira_create_playbook + respira_list_playbooks + respira_update_playbook MCP tools introduced in 7.1.

skills.name: Prime the Agent
skills.description: Fast 30-second session-starter. Loads the active site, identifies the page builder, loads inline schemas, and primes the agent on the do-not-write-raw-HTML rule before any work begins. v1.1 adds per-site memory: it reads a stored brief at the start and appends what it learned at the end, so context carries across sessions, teammates, and AI clients.
skills.author: Respira for WordPress

details.hero_subtitle: Run this at the top of any session before any editing. Identifies the active site, the page builder, and the working rules — so your agent stops writing raw HTML and starts using your builder's native modules.

capabilities.title: Site identification
capabilities.desc: Calls respira_get_active_site + respira_get_site_context to load WordPress version, PHP version, active theme, plugin count, multisite status.

capabilities.title: Builder detection
capabilities.desc: Calls respira_get_builder_info to identify which of the 16 supported page builders is active (Elementor, Bricks, Divi 5, Gutenberg, Oxygen, Breakdance, Beaver, Brizy, WPBakery, Visual Composer, Thrive, Flatsome, Spectra, Kadence, GenerateBlocks, SeedProd).

capabilities.title: Schema preload
capabilities.desc: Loads respira_get_builder_inline_schemas so the agent has the active builder's module attribute shapes in working memory before any write.

capabilities.title: Working rules briefing
capabilities.desc: Outputs the do-not-write-raw-HTML rule, the SafeEdit duplicate-before-edit rule, and the builder-native tool stack — so every subsequent edit goes through the right surface.

capabilities.title: Persistent site memory
capabilities.desc: Reads a per-site brief stored on the site (respira_get_option) at the start and appends durable learnings at the end (respira_update_option), so quirks and the division of labor survive across sessions, teammates, and AI clients.

details.v1_1_0_changes: Adds per-site memory. The skill now reads a stored brief (the respira_site_memory option) at the start of a session and offers to append what it learned at the end, so context persists across sessions and travels to teammates and other AI clients. Notes are treated as untrusted context, carry a confirmed date, and stay capped to a short brief.
details.v1_0_0_changes: Initial release in v7.1 Roots. Promotes the canonical session-starter preamble (previously a copy-paste snippet shared in customer support) to a first-class triggerable skill. Designed to be run before any other skill or work in a new conversation about a WordPress site.

skills.name: Stale Content Detector
skills.description: Find pages and posts that haven't been updated in a long time. Categorize as fresh / aging / stale / archive-candidate. Suggest refresh, redirect, or archive per item — based on age, traffic signal, and internal link count.
skills.author: Respira for WordPress

details.hero_subtitle: Find the content drag on your site in 30 seconds. What to refresh, what to redirect, what to archive — based on age, traffic, and internal link equity.

capabilities.title: Four-bucket categorization
capabilities.desc: Fresh (<6mo, leave alone) · Aging (6–12mo, review headline + opener) · Stale (12–24mo, refresh meaningfully) · Archive-candidate (24+mo, action depends on traffic + links).

capabilities.title: Evergreen pages skipped
capabilities.desc: About, contact, pricing, privacy, terms, legal, imprint, FAQ, support — opinionated default list, overridable.

capabilities.title: Top-5 refresh priority
capabilities.desc: Ranked by traffic + internal link equity, so you know where to start. Not 'all old content equally' — 'this one will move the needle if you refresh it.'

capabilities.title: Never deletes
capabilities.desc: Archive-candidates get a recommendation, not a deletion. You decide. Pairs with the SEO & AEO Amplifier when you choose 'refresh'.

skills.name: Build an Oxygen 6 Page
skills.description: Build or rebuild pages on Oxygen 6 (Jenga) as native, editable elements instead of a single HTML block. Hands the agent Oxygen 6's structure: the element schemas, the header/footer/template post types, and the Template Content Area rule.
skills.author: Respira for WordPress

details.hero_subtitle: Rebuilding a site into Oxygen 6? Build it as real, editable Oxygen elements, not a wall of HTML. The structure (header/footer/template post types, Template Content Area, the element vocabulary) is handed to the agent up front.

capabilities.title: Native Oxygen 6 elements
capabilities.desc: Author with simplified types (section, heading, text, button, image, and more) that Respira maps to the real OxygenElements and EssentialElements classes. The page stays editable in the Visual Builder.

capabilities.title: Knows Oxygen's structure
capabilities.desc: The header, footer, and template post types and the element schemas are handed to the agent, so it stops rediscovering them every run and stops burning tokens.

capabilities.title: Template Content Area rule
capabilities.desc: Templates use a Template Content Area element where the page body renders, never a Post Content element (which errors on Oxygen 6).

capabilities.title: No HTML-block dumps
capabilities.desc: Refuses the common failure where a whole page is dropped into one code block. Builds section by section and reads before it edits.

details.v1_0_0_changes: Initial release. Gives Oxygen 6 the native-build guidance that Divi and Bricks already had.

skills.name: Figma to Elementor
skills.description: Rebuilds a Figma frame as an editable Elementor page. Reads the Figma node tree (layers, auto-layout, text, color, images), maps each node to its Elementor widget or container, and writes clean Elementor JSON to a draft duplicate so nothing live is touched.
skills.author: Respira for WordPress

details.hero_subtitle: Hand a Figma frame to your agent and get a real, editable Elementor page. It reads layers, auto-layout, type, color, and images, and builds it on a safe draft.

capabilities.title: Auto-layout aware
capabilities.desc: Figma auto-layout becomes Elementor flex containers: direction, gap, padding, and alignment carried across.

capabilities.title: Type and color fidelity
capabilities.desc: Fonts, sizes, weights, line-height, and the frame's palette map to Elementor typography and global colors.

capabilities.title: Smart widgets
capabilities.desc: Recognises FAQ to Accordion, image rows to Gallery or Carousel, number plus label to Counter, icon rows to Social Icons.

capabilities.title: Safe by default
capabilities.desc: Builds on a draft duplicate with a snapshot first, so your live pages are never touched.
